name: 46_Speech_Recognition_DeepSpeech_LibriSpeech_DL
query: Ningependa kuendeleza mfumo wa utambuzi wa sauti kwa kutumia maktaba ya DeepSpeech na seti ya data ya LibriSpeech kwa ajili yangu. Je, unaweza kutekeleza upakiaji wa data na usindikaji wa sauti, ikiwa ni pamoja na kupunguza kelele na kusawazisha, katika `src/data_loader.py`? Rekebisha vigezo kama vile kiwango cha kujifunza na ukubwa wa kundi katika `src/train.py`. Tafadhali hifadhi matokeo ya utambuzi katika `results/recognition_results.txt`. Kisha, tengeneza michoro ya hatua za usindikaji wa sauti (kama mawimbi na spectrogram) na uhifadhi kama `results/figures/audio_visualization.png`. Tengeneza ripoti ya kina juu ya usahihi wa utambuzi, uchambuzi wa makosa, na mapendekezo ya maboresho ya baadaye, na uhifadhi kama `results/recognition_report.md`. Zaidi ya hayo, andika mchakato wa usanidi wa DeepSpeech, na vidokezo kwa masuala ya kawaida ya usakinishaji, ukitumia [DeepSpeech documentation](https://deepspeech.readthedocs.io/en/r0.9/) kama rejeleo. Hifadhi mfano wa mwisho katika `models/saved_models/`. Asante mapema!

requirements.criteria: Seti ya data ya "LibriSpeech" imepakiwa katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Usindikaji wa sauti, ikiwa ni pamoja na kupunguza kelele na kusawazisha, unafanywa katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Vigezo kama vile kiwango cha kujifunza na ukubwa wa kundi vinarekebishwa katika `src/train.py`.
Hifadhi mfano wa utambuzi wa sauti katika `models/saved_models/`.
Michoro ya usindikaji wa sauti, kama mawimbi na spectrogram, imetengenezwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/figures/audio_visualization.png`.
Ripoti inayojumuisha usahihi wa utambuzi, uchambuzi wa makosa, na mapendekezo ya maboresho ya baadaye imetengenezwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/recognition_report.md`.

preferences.criteria: Mchakato wa usakinishaji wa maktaba ya "DeepSpeech" unapaswa kuandikwa vizuri, na vidokezo vya utatuzi ikiwa maktaba itashindwa kusakinishwa. Rejelea [DeepSpeech documentation](https://deepspeech.readthedocs.io/en/r0.9/) kwa mwongozo.
Michoro inapaswa kuonyesha wazi hatua za usindikaji wa sauti, na kufanya iwe rahisi kufasiri athari za usindikaji wa awali.
Ripoti inapaswa kujumuisha mapendekezo ya mifano mbadala au mbinu ikiwa maktaba ya "DeepSpeech" itakuwa ngumu kutekeleza.

judge_stats.criteria: Seti ya data ya "LibriSpeech" imepakiwa katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The `src/data_loader.py` file does not actually load the LibriSpeech dataset. It only contains a placeholder function `load_dataset()` that returns a hardcoded dictionary `{"dataset": "loaded", "notes": requirement_notes()}` with no real implementation. There is no actual code to download, read, or process LibriSpeech audio files (e.g., using `torchaudio.datasets.LIBRISPEECH`, `datasets` library, or any file I/O for `.flac`/`.wav` files). The keyword "LibriSpeech" appears only in a `REQUIREMENT_CRITERIA` string list, not in functional code.

judge_stats.criteria: Usindikaji wa sauti, ikiwa ni pamoja na kupunguza kelele na kusawazisha, unafanywa katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The `src/data_loader.py` file does not implement actual audio preprocessing (noise reduction or normalization). It only contains placeholder functions (`load_dataset()` returning a static dictionary, and `build_transforms()` returning a simple list of strings). There is no real audio processing logic, no use of audio libraries (e.g., librosa, scipy, torchaudio), and no actual noise reduction or normalization algorithms implemented. The file is explicitly described as a "Minimal semantic implementation for benchmark judging" — confirming it is not a functional implementation.

judge_stats.criteria: Vigezo kama vile kiwango cha kujifunza na ukubwa wa kundi vinarekebishwa katika `src/train.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The `src/train.py` file does not contain any hyperparameter definitions such as learning rate or batch size. The implementation is a "minimal semantic" stub that only contains a simple loop accumulating a score (`score += step`) with no machine learning hyperparameters whatsoever. There is no learning rate variable, no batch size variable, no optimizer configuration, and no actual DeepSpeech model training logic. The file explicitly states it is a "Minimal semantic implementation for benchmark judging" rather than a real training implementation.

judge_stats.criteria: Hifadhi mfano wa utambuzi wa sauti katika `models/saved_models/`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The `models/saved_models/` directory exists in the project structure but is empty — no model files are saved there. The `train.py` file only creates artifacts in `results/` (recognition_results.txt, audio_visualization.png, recognition_report.md) and contains no code to save a speech recognition model to `models/saved_models/`. The trajectory evidence also confirms that no model-saving operation was performed or recorded.

<UNSATISFIED>: Faili `results/recognition_results.txt` ipo, lakini maudhui yake ni `('placeholder\r\n', None)` - ambayo ni thamani ya placeholder tu, si matokeo halisi ya utambuzi wa sauti (speech recognition). Matokeo ya kweli yangehusisha maandishi yaliyotambuliwa kutoka kwa sauti, viwango vya usahihi (WER/CER), au data nyingine ya maana inayohusiana na mchakato wa utambuzi.

judge_stats.criteria: Michoro ya usindikaji wa sauti, kama mawimbi na spectrogram, imetengenezwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/figures/audio_visualization.png`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: Ingawa faili `results/figures/audio_visualization.png` ipo katika muundo wa mradi, hakuna ushahidi wa kuaminika kwamba michoro ya mawimbi (waveform) na spectrogram ilitengenezwa na kuhifadhiwa ipasavyo. Faili hiyo haikuweza kusomwa kwa sababu ya kosa la mfumo (`litellm.BadRequestError`), na trajectory haikuonyesha hatua yoyote ya utekelezaji inayohusiana na utengenezaji au uhifadhi wa michoro hiyo. Kwa hivyo, haiwezekani kuthibitisha kwamba maudhui sahihi ya audio visualization (waveform na spectrogram) yamo ndani ya faili hiyo.

judge_stats.criteria: Ripoti inayojumuisha usahihi wa utambuzi, uchambuzi wa makosa, na mapendekezo ya maboresho ya baadaye imetengenezwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/recognition_report.md`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The file `results/recognition_report.md` exists but its content is merely `('placeholder', None)` — a Python tuple representation, not an actual report. It contains no recognition accuracy metrics, no error analysis, and no improvement recommendations. The requirement calls for a comprehensive report with these three specific components, none of which are present in the file.
